content.query:
--redact diagnosis code
update c
    set c.[DIAG_CD1] = icd.suppression
from [appl].[deid_claims_1_t] c
    inner join [dim].[icd_sensitive_codes_t] icd
        on c.[DIAG_CD1] <> '' and c.[DIAG_CD1] = icd.code 
        and c.[ICD_VERSION] = icd.icd_version
        and icd.type = 'Diagnosis'
GO
